title: Insaaf: Tale of Legends
overview: Yusuf, a brutal underworld kingpin, clashes with a relentless cop as a mysterious vigilante wages war on crime. As loyalties blur and vengeance builds, a high-stakes battle unfolds where justice teeters-hero, villain and avenger converge.
